author: Atris Labs
name: 10L MLP3x Int5/Int6 + BigramHash + SmearGate + SWA
blurb: 25.5M param model. 3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1807 (seed42: 1.1803, seed2024: 1.1808, seed1337: 1.1810, std=0.0004). Int5 MLP + Int6 attn, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, SWA(24 ckpts), WD=0.04, grad_clip=0.3, 3% pruning, seq_len=2048, 8xH100.
